_note: Xenon community gallery catalog. Rendered by docs/index.html and served to the app via GET /api/community/catalog. Entries are moderated: submit yours with a PR (see README.md in this folder). Every field is re-validated by the app before display, and installing always goes through the normal import preview.

entries.name: Ember Nights
entries.author: Xenon
entries.description: Warm amber accent over a deep charcoal glass — a cozy evening look for the Edge.

entries.name: Deep Ocean
entries.author: Xenon
entries.description: Cool cyan on abyssal navy — calm, high-contrast and easy on the eyes at night.

entries.name: Silk Waves
entries.author: Xenon
entries.description: Slow flowing wave lines over a midnight gradient — an animated backdrop that stays out of the way.

entries.name: Nocturne
entries.author: Xenon
entries.description: A quiet late-night look: sage-teal accent over deep charcoal-navy glass, with a soft drifting backdrop baked in. Calm and easy on the eyes after dark.

entries.name: Nocturne Drift
entries.author: Xenon
entries.description: A calm animated backdrop: slow sage glows drifting over a near-black wash with a faint twinkling starfield. Bounded and quiet, it stays out of the way.

entries.name: Nocturne Control
entries.author: Xenon
entries.description: An eight-key Deck profile for everyday control: media transport, mic mute, volume up or down, a 25-minute focus timer and a volume fader. Portable across machines.

entries.name: Nocturne Desk
entries.author: Xenon
entries.description: A tidy dashboard page: now playing on the left with system, weather, agenda and tasks arranged cleanly beside it. A calm home screen for the Edge.

entries.name: Nocturne Now Playing
entries.author: Xenon
entries.description: A now-playing player: the album cover fills the tile behind the track, artist, a progress bar and play/pause, previous and next controls. Follows your theme accent. Needs media access and control.

entries.name: Nocturne Hours
entries.author: Xenon
entries.description: A calm fullscreen clock for Ambient mode: big time, the date and one slow breathing glow on a dim OLED-friendly background. Requests no permissions.

entries.name: Nocturne Pack
entries.author: Xenon
entries.description: The whole Nocturne look in one install: the theme with its drifting backdrop, the now-playing widget, the ambient clock scene, the Deck profile and the desk page.
